name: Country Breakfast Casserole
recipeIngredient: 12 oz Bulk pork sausage - mild or spicy
4 cups Frozen hash browns - diced, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a large skillet, cook the sausage until browned.
3. Add onions and cook until softened.
4. Stir in hash browns and salsa, then mix in cheese.
5. Pour egg mixture over top.
6. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until set.
7. Turn off heat and serve.
